'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=00sTqZfXawVqA_6sT81Mh8tc771w25ynW3tqQCsDQdU-1773016076-1.0.1.1-Bd6s0j.mvXKCoGr5C2er7fNnW7RekJ_X7T18xrv5AJU"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
